name: Creative Agency Owner
profile: Founder or Creative Director at a small creative agency (3–10 people). Juggles client delivery and business development simultaneously.

demographics.role: Founder, Creative Director, or Agency Owner

goals: Generate consistent inbound leads without cold outreach
Scale content marketing output without hiring
Repurpose existing assets across channels efficiently
pain_points: Writes good content but never reuses it
No time to create multiple campaign variants
Manual newsletter creation eats into billable hours
Small team can't keep up with distribution demands
messaging_angle: Show how one blog post can automatically become multiple client acquisition campaigns.
cta_style: Professional and ROI-oriented. Examples: 'See how it works for agencies →', 'Get your free workflow audit →'
preferred_tone: Peer-to-peer, strategic, respects expertise and time
content_hooks: Turn your best content into a lead machine
One post. Five campaigns. Zero extra hours.
Your team writes once. NovaMind distributes everywhere.

name: Marketing Manager (Startup)
profile: Marketing Manager or Growth Manager at a 10–50 person startup. Owns email performance, runs campaigns, reports to leadership.

demographics.role: Marketing Manager, Growth Manager, or Head of Marketing

goals: Improve open rates and CTR across all campaigns
Optimize funnel conversion from email to signup
pain_points: Sends same email to entire list regardless of segment
Low engagement from generic broadcast blasts
Manual segmentation is too slow to scale
Hard to personalize without a big engineering team
messaging_angle: Show how one content asset becomes segmented, personalized campaigns automatically.
cta_style: Data-driven and action-oriented. Examples: 'Boost your CTR today →', 'Start your free 14-day trial →'
content_hooks: Stop sending the same email to everyone
Your best campaign starts with one blog post.

name: Freelancer / Solo Creator
tagline: Do more with less — and stay consistent
profile: Independent creator, freelance marketer, or designer working solo. Wears every hat, limited time for marketing.

demographics.role: Freelance Designer, Content Creator, or Independent Marketer

goals: Save time on content creation and repurposing
Stay consistent with newsletters without burning out
Grow audience steadily while focusing on client work
pain_points: Limited time for content production each week
Hard to convert blog posts into compelling emails
No automation system — everything is manual
messaging_angle: Show how AI instantly generates multiple emails from one blog post.
cta_style: Friendly, efficiency-focused. Examples: 'Try it free — no credit card →', 'See how much time you\'ll save →'
content_hooks: You wrote the blog. Let AI do the rest.
One post → a full week of content.
Stop starting from scratch every Monday.
